examples: Most of what you are taught is malarkey.
Do you think anyone is willing to listen to that malarkey?
Keep your mouth shut! Do you think anyone is willing to listen to that malarkey?
They know a bunch of malarkey (to coin a phrase) when they hear it.
If you don't like the site and think UFO study is malarkey, don't flame its Web master and tell him I sent you.
